description_long: This object is a detailed sculpture of a bird, specifically resembling a snowy owl, perched on a textured base that mimics a tree stump or rock. The bird's body is covered in intricately carved feathers, with layered, overlapping shapes that create a realistic, three-dimensional effect. Its head is rounded with prominent, forward-facing yellow eyes and a sharply defined, hooked beak, giving it an alert and intense expression. The wings are folded against the body, and the tail feathers are visible, fanning slightly at the back. The surface is predominantly white with subtle gray shading and dark spots, simulating the natural plumage of a snowy owl. The base is rough and earthy, contrasting with the bird's smooth, feathered texture.
description: A lifelike snowy owl sculpture with layered white and gray feathers, perched on a textured base and featuring striking yellow eyes and a hooked beak.
description_view_0: Front view showing the owl's intense yellow eyes, hooked beak, and detailed feather layering on the chest and wings.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view highlighting the side of the head, the curvature of the back, and the textured base beneath the talons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back and tail feathers, with the layered feather pattern and the full base visible.
description_view_3: Side-rear view emphasizing the rounded head, folded wings, and the subtle gradation of feather layers along the back.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Layered white feathers with gray spots and mottling across the wings and back
